channel.title: Harun's Daily Briefing
channel.description: A personal daily news briefing covering AI and tech, business and markets, marketing and DTC, and world news.
channel.itunes:author: Harun
channel.itunes:summary: A personal daily news briefing covering AI and tech, business and markets, marketing and DTC, and world news.

item.title: May 19, 2026 — Anthropic tops OpenAI, Iran oil spike, DTC CAC crisis
item.description:
Today's briefing: • Anthropic in talks to raise fifty billion dollars at a valuation topping OpenAI, plus ten new financial services agents • Trump heads to Beijing for first US presidential visit to China since twenty seventeen • DTC customer acquisition costs up forty to sixty percent — first-order economics are broken • Fed holds eight to four, Brent crude near one hundred and twenty dollars per barrel • World's first commercial orbital outpost launches this month
Sections: 00:00 Open 00:45 AI & Tech 10:00 World News 14:00 DTC & Ecommerce 18:00 Markets 21:00 Science
item.itunes:author: Harun

item.title: May 18, 2026 — Nvidia week, Project Glasswing, and the DTC reset
item.description: Nvidia earnings set the tone for the AI trade as the Fed leadership changes hands. Anthropic gates its Mythos Preview model behind Project Glasswing while OpenAI launches its Frontier enterprise platform. Plus, the DTC unit economics shift and the geopolitical risks now moving oil.
item.itunes:author: Harun

item.title: May 17, 2026 — Mythos vs Daybreak, Iran inflation, iOS 26 attribution
item.description: Anthropic's Claude Mythos cybersecurity model faces off against OpenAI Daybreak as the AI arms race accelerates. Markets pulled back Friday on Iran inflation fears and a lukewarm Trump-Xi summit, while iOS 26 fingerprinting changes deliver the biggest DTC attribution disruption since iOS 14.
item.itunes:author: Harun

item.title: May 16, 2026 — Anthropic's 80x growth, Cerebras IPO, Strait of Hormuz
item.description: Anthropic's eighty times quarterly revenue growth forces a compute deal with SpaceXAI's Colossus data center. Cerebras surges sixty-eight percent in the biggest tech IPO since Uber. Markets sell off Friday as the Trump-Xi summit disappoints and Treasury yields spike on Strait of Hormuz tensions.
item.itunes:author: Harun

item.title: May 15, 2026 — Anthropic restricts Mythos, indexes hit records, iOS 26 hits attribution
item.description: Anthropic limits its new Claude Mythos Preview to vetted enterprises over cybersecurity risk. The S&P 500, Nasdaq, and Dow all closed at record highs on 25% earnings growth and the H200 export thaw. iOS 26's fingerprinting protection is materially degrading default Meta and Google attribution for DTC brands.
item.itunes:author: Harun
